title: Preventing global subitem column movement
excerpt:
When people move around subitem columns on a specific board view, it has a global effect on all views including the main table view. I am looking to prevent this. 
When people move around item columns on their board view…

posts.author: dea (Dea)
posts.cookedHtml:
When people move around subitem columns on a specific board view, it has a global effect on all views including the main table view. I am looking to prevent this.

When people move around item columns on their board view, this problem does not exist.
